name: Ornament and Crime v4.1
description: Phazerville-ready O.C. v4.1 DIY kit with eight CV inputs, eight CV outputs, dual audio I/O and expansion for triggers, USB and MIDI. Runs four applets at once on Teensy 4.1 hardware.

controls.name: Left Encoder
controls.description: Navigates pages and coarse parameters; press actions depend on the active applet or setup screen.
controls.detail: rotate for pagination / coarse edits · press for select / edit

controls.name: Right Encoder
controls.description: Moves the cursor and fine-adjusts parameters; long-press actions enter menus or confirm setup changes.
controls.detail: rotate for cursor / fine edits · press for select / confirm

controls.name: A
controls.description: Selects the northwest applet or acts as the first action button in the current app.
controls.detail: press to focus the top-left slot

controls.name: B
controls.description: Selects the northeast applet or the second action button in the current app.
controls.detail: press to focus the top-right slot

controls.name: X
controls.description: Selects the southwest applet or the third action button in the current app.
controls.detail: press to focus the bottom-left slot

controls.name: Y
controls.description: Selects the southeast applet or the fourth action button in the current app.
controls.detail: press to focus the bottom-right slot

controls.name: Z
controls.description: Starts, stops or arms the internal clock depending on the current applet and mode.

inputs.name: CV IN 1-8
inputs.description: Eight control-voltage inputs for applets and DSP lanes.

inputs.name: TRIG IN 1-8
inputs.description: Eight trigger inputs exposed through the expansion ports.

inputs.name: AUDIO IN 1/2
inputs.description: Stereo or dual-mono audio inputs for the DSP applets.

inputs.name: USB
inputs.description: USB connection used for firmware, MIDI and host communication through the expansion interface.

inputs.name: MIDI
inputs.description: MIDI expansion input for clocking and remote control.

outputs.name: CV OUT 1-8
outputs.description: Eight control-voltage outputs from the active applets.

outputs.name: AUDIO OUT 1/2
outputs.description: Stereo or dual-mono audio outputs from the DSP applets.

outputs.name: TRIG OUT 1-8
outputs.description: Trigger outputs available through expansion and applet routing.

behaviors.name: Quadrants multitasking
behaviors.description: Loads four applets at once, one per quadrant, so CV utility, sequencing and DSP functions can run in parallel on the same hardware.

behaviors.name: Dual audio pipeline
behaviors.description: The Teensy 4.1 hardware supports two lanes of audio-rate DSP in addition to the CV applets, so the module can process sound and modulation together.

behaviors.name: Trigger mapping
behaviors.description: Expansion trigger inputs can be mapped into applets, allowing external clocks, gates and resets to steer the currently loaded tools.

behaviors.name: Calibration and control flip
behaviors.description: The calibration screen handles encoder reversal, screen flip and output calibration without needing to reflash the firmware.

behaviors.name: Applet menu switching
behaviors.description: The right encoder opens the main app menu, where stored applets, presets and global settings are selected.

behaviors.name: MIDI and USB expansion
behaviors.description: The expansion ports break out USB, MIDI and additional triggers so the module can act as a deep control hub rather than a simple quantizer.

patchIdeas.name: Four applet hub
patchIdeas.patch: Quadrants mode with a quantizer, random source, clock utility and envelope applet loaded at once · the module acts as a compact modulation brain with one quadrant per task.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ornament and Crime v4.1:
* Mode: Quadrants
* App A: quantizer
* App B: random
* App X: clock utility
* App Y: envelope

Keyboard:
VCO:
VCA:
Envelope:

- Keyboard (CV) p> Ornament and Crime v4.1 (CV IN 1)
- Ornament and Crime v4.1 (CV OUT 1) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Ornament and Crime v4.1 (CV OUT 2) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Trigger-and-pitch sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: Use a sequencer applet to emit stepped pitch on CV OUT 1 and related gates on CV OUT 2/trigger mapping · a single module handles melody and articulation.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ornament and Crime v4.1:
* Mode: sequencer applet

VCO:
Envelope:
VCA:

- Clock (Out) c> Ornament and Crime v4.1 (TRIG IN 1)
- Ornament and Crime v4.1 (CV OUT 1) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Ornament and Crime v4.1 (CV OUT 2) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Audio DSP lane
patchIdeas.patch: Two audio lanes feed a stereo DSP applet while CV IN 1 modulates a parameter map · the module can process the sound and the control path without leaving the rack.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ornament and Crime v4.1:
* Mode: audio DSP

DAW:
Output:
LFO:

- DAW (Out L) -> Ornament and Crime v4.1 (AUDIO IN 1)
- DAW (Out R) -> Ornament and Crime v4.1 (AUDIO IN 2)
- LFO (Out) >> Ornament and Crime v4.1 (CV IN 1)
- Ornament and Crime v4.1 (AUDIO OUT 1) -> Output (In L)
- Ornament and Crime v4.1 (AUDIO OUT 2) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Clock-armed quantizer
patchIdeas.patch: Load a quantizer applet, clock it from the Z transport or an external trigger and route the output to a VCO · the same panel can stay in tune while the other applets run nearby.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ornament and Crime v4.1:
* Mode: quantizer applet

Clock:
Quantizer:
VCO:
Envelope:
VCA:

- Clock (Out) c> Ornament and Crime v4.1 (TRIG IN 1)
- Ornament and Crime v4.1 (CV OUT 1) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Ornament and Crime v4.1 (CV OUT 2) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)
